prompt: Add a /products/new page with EditForm + DataAnnotations validation. Fields: Name (required, 3-100 chars), SKU (required, regex ^[A-Z]{3}-\d{4}$), Price (required, > 0, currency-formatted), Category (dropdown of Electronics/Clothing/Food), InStock (checkbox), Description (optional, max 500 chars). On valid submit: call ProductService.CreateAsync, show success snackbar, reset form. On cancel: navigate to /products.

assertions.text: CreateProduct.razor uses <DataAnnotationsValidator /> as a child of EditForm
The model class has [Required] and [StringLength(100, MinimumLength = 3)] (or equivalent) on Name
The model class has [RegularExpression("^[A-Z]{3}-\\d{4}$")] on SKU
The model class has [Range] (or [Range(0.01, ...)]) on Price ensuring > 0
The model class has [StringLength(500)] (or equivalent) on Description
The submit button uses ButtonType="ButtonType.Submit" (required for EditForm submit)
MudBlazor inputs have For="@(() => model.X)" so validation messages are wired
OnValidSubmit handler calls ProductService.CreateAsync with the model
After successful submit, the code calls Snackbar.Add(...) with Severity.Success
After successful submit, the model is reset (e.g., new instance assigned)
The cancel button navigates to /products via NavigationManager.NavigateTo
